scripts.check: node --check core.mjs && node --check storage-sql.mjs && node --check server.mjs && node --check worker.mjs
scripts.native:ios: npm run native:sync && cap open ios
scripts.native:android: npm run native:sync && cap open android
scripts.native:android:debug: npm run native:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.native:android:bundle: npm run native:sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease && cd .. && npm run native:android:verify
scripts.native:ios:upload: npm run native:sync && IOS_EXPORT_DESTINATION=upload node scripts/ios-appstore-export.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run check:js && npm run test:equipment-ui && npm run test:admin-ui && npm run test:storage && node scripts/check-pre-release.mjs && npm run native:release:check
